name: agent-team
description: Project / Task oriented OpenCode Code Agent orchestration tool

scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:embedded-assets && tsc --noEmit
scripts.dist:win: bun run build && bun build --compile --target bun-windows-x64 ./src/cli/index.ts --outfile ./dist/agent-team.exe
scripts.dist:mac-arm64: bun run build && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 ./src/cli/index.ts --outfile ./dist/agent-team-macos-arm64
scripts.dist:mac-x64: bun run build && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 ./src/cli/index.ts --outfile ./dist/agent-team-macos-x64
